title: Supabase Full Stack Development
subtitle: Postgres, Auth, Realtime, Storage, and Edge Functions — the open-source Firebase, but stronger.
summary: Supabase gives you a production-grade Postgres database with auth, realtime subscriptions, storage, edge functions, and a generated REST + GraphQL API on top — all open source and self-hostable. This course walks through building a real full-stack application with Supabase: schema design and Row Level Security, auth flows with magic links and OAuth, realtime channels, storage with policies, and edge functions for server logic. By the end you can architect a Supabase backend that scales from prototype to production.

modules.title: Postgres is the platform
modules.objective: Understand why Postgres-first changes the architecture.
